Uses of Class
redis.clients.jedis.resps.Tuple

  • Packages that use Tuple 
    Package Description
    redis.clients.jedis  
    redis.clients.jedis.commands
    This package contains the interfaces that contain methods representing Redis core commands.
    redis.clients.jedis.resps
    This package contains custom responses of core Redis commands.
    redis.clients.jedis.search
    This package contains the classes and interfaces related to RediSearch module.

    • Uses of Tuple in redis.clients.jedis

      Response<Set<Tuple>> TransactionBase.zinterWithScores(ZParams params, byte[]... keys) 
      Set<Tuple> Jedis.zinterWithScores(ZParams params, byte[]... keys)
      Intersect multiple sorted sets, This command is similar to ZINTERSTORE, but instead of storing the resulting sorted set, it is returned to the connection.
      CommandObject<Set<Tuple>> CommandObjects.zinterWithScores(ZParams params, byte[]... keys)

      List<Tuple> Jedis.zrangeByScoreWithScores(byte[] key, double min, double max)
      Return the all the elements in the sorted set at key with a score between min and max (including elements with score equal to min or max).

      Response<Set<Tuple>> TransactionBase.zunionWithScores(ZParams params, byte[]... keys) 
      Set<Tuple> Jedis.zunionWithScores(ZParams params, byte[]... keys)
      Add multiple sorted sets with scores, This command is similar to ZUNIONSTORE, but instead of storing the resulting sorted set, it is returned to the connection.
      CommandObject<Set<Tuple>> CommandObjects.zunionWithScores(ZParams params, byte[]... keys) 
      Set<Tuple> UnifiedJedis.zunionWithScores(ZParams params, byte[]... keys)

      Set<Tuple> Jedis.zunionWithScores(ZParams params, String... keys)
      Add multiple sorted sets with scores, This command is similar to ZUNIONSTORE, but instead of storing the resulting sorted set, it is returned to the connection.
      CommandObject<Set<Tuple>> CommandObjects.zunionWithScores(ZParams params, String... keys)

      Tuple SortedSetBinaryCommands.zpopmax(byte[] key) 
      Tuple SortedSetCommands.zpopmax(String key)
      Remove and return the member with the highest score in the sorted set stored at key.
      Tuple SortedSetBinaryCommands.zpopmin(byte[] key) 
      Tuple SortedSetCommands.zpopmin(String key)
      Remove and return the member with the lowest score in the sorted set stored at key.

      Similar to ZRANGE but return with scores.

      List<Tuple> SortedSetCommands.zrangeByScoreWithScores(String key, double min, double max, int offset, int count)
      Similar to ZRANGE but with limit option, and return with scores.

      List<Tuple> SortedSetCommands.zrangeByScoreWithScores(String key, String min, String max)
      Similar to ZRANGE but with exclusive range, and return with scores.

      List<Tuple> SortedSetCommands.zrangeByScoreWithScores(String key, String min, String max, int offset, int count)

      Returns the specified range of elements in the sorted set stored at key with the scores.

      Similar to ZRANGE but can be used with additional params.

      class  KeyedZSetElement
      This class is used to represent a SortedSet element when it is returned with respective key name.
